calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-23-2019 Continued To Aug-20-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Elaine Deane, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. The CRC 3.1385 Order to Show Cause is reset to Aug-20-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-22-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-21-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-16-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elaine Deane 925-939-1135 of Grundman & Deane for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Plaintiff informs the Court they did not send any contest email. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

KURT E. WILSON, ESQ.'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel

Attorney Kurt Wilson's motion to be relieved as counsel is GRANTED. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Proposed judicial council order submitted is being reviewed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR#7489, mgheno@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/RBU)
